data.content: Implementation review rejected. (1) build-runtime-artifact.sh still ships PROMPT.md — description requires stopping prompt template shipping. (2) setup.sh still has _prompt_guidance_wizard and PROMPT.md references. (3) ~840 lines of unrelated rollback/step-failure tests deleted (execution-backend-rollback.test.ts, terminal-manager-step-failure-rollback.test.ts, pre-dispatch edge cases, rollbackBeatState edge cases) — these test critical rollback behavior, not prompt-guidance. (4) doctor.ts line 876 comment changed FROM stale-parent TO prompt-guidance, introducing a new reference instead of removing one. (5) Unused imports added to doctor test files.
